series_metadata.series_description: Recording of inquiries to agency administration from the general public or government agencies. Records may include: Correspondence, responsive records and any additional record relevant to provide proper customer service to constituents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the date of receipt of the inquiry. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the date of receipt of the inquiry. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
